contato.contato-text: Liked what you saw? Reach out to me through one of these channels!

skills.title: Skills
skills.text: Take a look at some of my skills and technologies

about.description: Software Engineering student at PUC Minas and Electronics Technician from CEFET-MG, with experience in developing and deploying technological solutions that integrate hardware and software. I'm driven by challenges, constant learning, and a passion for motorcycles — where I find inspiration to explore new paths both inside and outside of technology. 🏍️

experienciaProfissional.descricao: Responsible for dispatching and supervising low-voltage service orders, ensuring efficient execution of activities. Also manages and monitors medium-voltage service orders, developing strategies for work order execution and acting as a liaison between field electricians and medium-voltage controllers, ensuring operational alignment and safety.

experienciaAcademica.titulo: Lecture: Programming Immersion at Leopoldo de Miranda State School
experienciaAcademica.descricao: I delivered an immersive lecture about the fundamentals of programming to high school students, using practical and inspiring examples. The goal was to spark interest in the technology field.

I designed, built, and programmed an autonomous robot that moved using HC-SR04 sound sensors. The project involved integrating sensors, a microcontroller (Arduino), DC motors, and developing PID control algorithms in C++.
